title: Contribute to the development of products or applications
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Contribute to the development of products or applications demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Scope the development project

pcs.text: Confirm details of new product or application brief from consultation and available information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm details of new product or application brief from consultation and available information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm details of new product or application brief from consultation and available information.

pcs.text: Specify new product/application requirements according to brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify new product/application requirements according to brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify new product/application requirements according to brief.

pcs.text: Analyse existing products (internal and external to workplace) to determine if they meet customer need

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse existing products (internal and external to workplace) to determine if they meet customer need.

pcs.text: Interpret and apply relevant Acts, regulations and codes of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and apply relevant Acts, regulations and codes of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and apply relevant Acts, regulations and codes of practice.

pcs.text: Prepare product/application development plan that reflects internal and external parameters
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare product/application development plan that reflects internal and external parameters?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare product/application development plan that reflects internal and external parameters.

pcs.text: Obtain approval for development plan from appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain approval for development plan from appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain approval for development plan from appropriate personnel.
